prestazioni: G16E-GTS 1.6L turbocharged inline-3 engine: Full forged internals with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei, paired with a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe by HKS, supporting 400+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing a flex-fuel sensor and 1,000cc ID injectors from Injector Dynamics

Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 30-way rebound damping, custom valving for the GR Yaris chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts from Whiteline, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear adjustable sway bars and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for subframe and control arms

OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) with billet differential case and 4.375 final drive ratio, mated to a 6-speed GR-Four close-ratio transmission with a reinforced synchro set from ATS and a twin-disc carbon clutch from Sachs Performance (240mm, 800Nm torque capacity)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, featuring integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS rear wing with Gurney flap (adjustable angle via quick-release mounts) for 200+ kg of downforce at 160 km/h

Custom carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts (functional, feeding the Garrett intercooler) and a vented heat extractor from Seibon Carbon, paired with a full titanium bolt kit from ARP for weight reduction (saving ~1.8kg)

Recaro SP-G TS II front seats with GR Yaris-specific mounting brackets (retaining OEM airbag functionality) and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, complemented by a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, 3.2mm wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360) and a carbon fiber rear seat delete panel from Varis
